deep_dive.title: Spectral Guidance for Flexible and Efficient Control of Diffusion Models
deep_dive.abstract: We introduce Spectral Guidance, a framework for controlling diffusion models by leveraging the intrinsic geometry of the generative process. As data is progressively corrupted by noise, only a small number of features remain informative for control. We characterize them as the singular functions of a conditional expectation operator and show that they can be learned via a self-supervised objective. Once recovered, this basis enables the projection of arbitrary guidance signals, such as labels, CLIP embeddings, or masks, directly onto the sampling trajectory. This approach allows for stable, high-fidelity control without retraining or denoiser backpropagation during sampling. Empirically, we improve conditional accuracy on CIFAR-10 by 37 percentage points over the strongest training-free baseline while offering $4\times$ faster sampling. Moreover, the same representations that support label and CLIP guidance also enable spatial control, such as mask-based guidance, without auxiliary models. Finally, our framework reveals a phase transition in the generative process, pinpointing the optimal time window for effective guidance.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Spectral Guidance enables stable control of diffusion models with arbitrary signals without retraining
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 光谱引导无需重训练即可用任意信号稳定控制扩散模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 光谱引导无需重训练即可用任意信号稳定控制扩散模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 光谱引导无需重训练即可用任意信号稳定控制扩散模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Spectral Guidance learns singular functions of a conditional expectation operator to project arbitrary guidance signals into diffusion sampling, achieving high-fidelity control without retraining.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 扩散模型控制通常需要重训练或反向传播。该论文提出光谱引导，利用条件期望算子奇异函数捕捉生成轨迹中的信息特征，并学习自监督目标。恢复的基向量可直接将标签、CLIP嵌入等引导信号投影到采样轨迹，实现无需重训练或求导的高保真控制。在CIFAR-10上条件准确率提升37个百分点。

deep_dive.title: Trajectory Constraints for Imaging Inverse Problems
deep_dive.abstract: Diffusion-based and iterative methods have become effective tools for solving imaging inverse problems. Their reconstruction process naturally forms a trajectory of intermediate estimates. Although these intermediate estimates define a reconstruction trajectory, most methods do not explicitly regularize the transitions between consecutive states. To address this limitation, we introduce TRACE, a training-free TRAjectory-Constrained rEconstruction framework that stabilizes the reconstruction path by coupling adjacent states along the trajectory. This gives a trajectory-level model that can be interpreted as a sequence of proximal updates. Since the exact proximal update is generally intractable, we approximate it with a neural mapping. This yields a diffusion-like reconstruction process with an explicit coupling between neighboring states. We provide a stability analysis showing that temporal coupling bounds trajectory variation and that this control is preserved under untrained network updates. Experiments on linear and nonlinear image reconstruction tasks show that TRACE improves reconstruction quality. Trajectory-level analyses and ablations confirm that temporal coupling directly affects state transitions along the reconstruction path.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于扩散的成像逆问题重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于扩散的成像逆问题重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于扩散的成像逆问题重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces TRACE, a training-free trajectory-constrained reconstruction framework that stabilizes diffusion-based imaging inverse problem solvers by coupling adjacent states along the reconstruction trajectory.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有扩散方法在求解成像逆问题时未显式正则化中间状态转换，导致重建轨迹不稳定。本文提出TRACE框架，通过耦合相邻状态约束重建轨迹，实现无训练稳定重建。该方法可解释为近似近端更新序列，在图像修复任务中展现出优越性能，为扩散模型在逆问题中的应用提供了新视角。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有扩散方法在求解成像逆问题时未显式正则化中间状态转换，导致重建轨迹不稳定。本文提出TRACE框架，通过耦合相邻状态约束重建轨迹，实现无训练稳定重建。该方法可解释为近似近端更新序列，在图像修复任务中展现出优越性能，为扩散模型在逆问题中的应用提供了新视角。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Image restoration and super resolution using diffusion and generative models

deep_dive.title: ConFi-GS Confidence-Guided High-Frequency Injection for 3D Gaussian Splatting Super-Resolution
deep_dive.abstract: Reconstructing high-quality 3D scenes from low-resolution multi-view images remains challenging for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), because insufficient high-frequency observations often lead to blurred textures, weak boundaries, and view-inconsistent details. Existing approaches either apply super-resolution guidance uniformly or localize enhancement regions based mainly on geometric sampling. However, they typically do not distinguish between two fundamentally different questions: where additional detail is needed, and whether the corresponding candidate high-frequency content is reliable enough to be internalized into a multi-view consistent 3D representation.   In this paper, we propose a reliability-aware frequency modeling framework for low-resolution 3DGS reconstruction. The framework first estimates a geometry-guided detail-demand prior to locate regions that are likely under-detailed under low-resolution supervision. It then computes a frequency-aware reliability map to determine whether candidate high-frequency details are structurally supported, spectrally unresolved, and cross-view stable. Combining these signals yields a detail-injection map that guides where super-resolved details should be introduced during optimization. Based on this map, we design a unified optimization scheme comprising spatially selective supervision, coarse-to-fine frequency regularization, and reliability-aware Gaussian densification. This scheme controls where reliable details are injected, when high-frequency supervision is activated, and how unresolved yet reliable details are internalized into the Gaussian representation. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show improved fidelity and perceptual quality while suppressing unstable or view-inconsistent details.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 三维高斯泼溅超分辨率
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 三维高斯泼溅超分辨率
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 三维高斯泼溅超分辨率
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes ConFi-GS, a confidence-guided high-frequency injection method for 3D Gaussian splatting super-resolution, distinguishing where detail is needed and whether high-frequency content is reliable.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 从低分辨率多视图图像重建高质量3D场景面临纹理模糊和细节不一致的挑战。本文提出ConFi-GS，通过置信度引导的高频注入，区分需要细节的区域和高频内容的可靠性，实现了超分辨率3D重建。该方法有效提升了3DGS的纹理质量和视图一致性，直接服务于3D超分辨率任务。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 从低分辨率多视图图像重建高质量3D场景面临纹理模糊和细节不一致的挑战。本文提出ConFi-GS，通过置信度引导的高频注入，区分需要细节的区域和高频内容的可靠性，实现了超分辨率3D重建。该方法有效提升了3DGS的纹理质量和视图一致性，直接服务于3D超分辨率任务。

deep_dive.title: A Principled Self-Referenced Early Stopping Approach for Deep Image Prior
deep_dive.abstract: Recently, Deep Image Prior (DIP) has demonstrated strong capabilities for solving inverse imaging problems (IIPs) by optimizing a randomly initialized convolutional neural network in a training-data-free regime. However, DIP suffers from overfitting to noisy measurements due to network over-parameterization, making early stopping (ES) essential. The most successful ES method tracks fluctuations in the running variance of the network output to detect overfitting. However, in many applications, these fluctuations may appear prematurely, leading to unstable reconstructions. In this paper, we first show that nearly optimal DIP early stopping can be achieved when two independent noisy copies of the degraded image are available. Motivated by this observation, and since obtaining two fully independent copies is infeasible, we propose an overfitting detection framework based on constructing pseudo self-referenced images, resulting in three IIP-specific algorithms. Our approach is further supported by theoretical results on single-reference validation, pseudo-validation estimation, and the impact of shared noise. Across different IIPs, ranging from natural image restoration to medical image reconstruction, and under varying noise levels and noise types, our methods consistently outperform existing DIP early stopping approaches, all without requiring an accurate estimate of the noise level.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Early stopping method for Deep Image Prior to improve image restoration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 深度图像先验的早停方法，用于改进图像重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 深度图像先验的早停方法，用于改进图像重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 深度图像先验的早停方法，用于改进图像重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a self-referenced early stopping approach for Deep Image Prior that uses two independent noisy copies to detect overfitting and improve image restoration quality.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 深度图像先验（DIP）在无训练数据条件下能有效解决逆成像问题，但容易过拟合噪声。本文提出一种基于原则的自参考早停方法，利用两幅独立的噪声退化图像副本实现近似最优的早停。该方法通过检测网络输出的运行方差波动，有效避免了过早停止和不稳定重建问题。实验表明该方法显著提升了DIP在多种图像复原任务上的性能，为无监督逆成像提供了更稳定的训练策略。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 深度图像先验（DIP）在无训练数据条件下能有效解决逆成像问题，但容易过拟合噪声。本文提出一种基于原则的自参考早停方法，利用两幅独立的噪声退化图像副本实现近似最优的早停。该方法通过检测网络输出的运行方差波动，有效避免了过早停止和不稳定重建问题。实验表明该方法显著提升了DIP在多种图像复原任务上的性能，为无监督逆成像提供了更稳定的训练策略。

deep_dive.title: Colored Noise Diffusion Sampling
deep_dive.abstract: Diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art image synthesis, with their generative trajectories fundamentally exhibiting a spectral bias, resolving low-frequency global structures early and high-frequency fine details later. Conventional stochastic differential equation (SDE) solvers fail to account for this dynamic, naively injecting uniform white noise throughout the entire process and misusing the finite energy budget. In this work, we establish a mathematical framework that reconsiders SDE inference as a targeted, frequency-decoupled energy transfer. Leveraging this framework, we introduce Colored Noise Sampling (CNS), a novel, training-free stochastic solver. Rather than injecting uniform white noise, CNS utilizes a dynamic, timestep- and frequency-dependent schedule that more efficiently allocates injected energy toward structurally unresolved frequency bands. By actively exploiting the model's inherent spectral bias, CNS systematically steers the generated distribution toward the true data manifold. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CNS significantly outperforms standard ODE and SDE baselines as a strictly plug-and-play, inference-time sampler substitution across diverse architectures (SiT, JiT, FLUX). Compared to standard sampling on ImageNet-256, CNS achieves substantial unguided FID reductions, improving from 8.26 to 6.27 on SiT-XL/2, 32.39 to 26.69 on JiT-B/16, and 11.88 to 8.31 on JiT-H/16, while yielding consistent relative FID improvements with Classifier-Free Guidance. Project page is available at https://hadardavidson.github.io/CNS/.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Colored Noise Sampling (CNS) improves diffusion model sampling by frequency-decoupled noise injection
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 有色噪声采样通过频率解耦噪声注入改进扩散模型采样
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 有色噪声采样通过频率解耦噪声注入改进扩散模型采样
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 有色噪声采样通过频率解耦噪声注入改进扩散模型采样
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Colored Noise Sampling (CNS) is a training-free stochastic solver that injects frequency-dependent noise, improving image synthesis quality and efficiency.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 扩散模型生成轨迹存在频谱偏差：先低频后高频。传统SDE求解器均匀注入白噪声，浪费能量预算。该论文提出有色噪声采样（CNS），根据时间步和频率动态调整噪声注入，实现更高效的频率解耦能量转移。CNS无需训练，直接替换现有求解器即可提升图像质量。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 扩散模型生成轨迹存在频谱偏差：先低频后高频。传统SDE求解器均匀注入白噪声，浪费能量预算。该论文提出有色噪声采样（CNS），根据时间步和频率动态调整噪声注入，实现更高效的频率解耦能量转移。CNS无需训练，直接替换现有求解器即可提升图像质量。

quick_skim.title: A Principled Self-Referenced Early Stopping Approach for Deep Image Prior
quick_skim.abstract: Recently, Deep Image Prior (DIP) has demonstrated strong capabilities for solving inverse imaging problems (IIPs) by optimizing a randomly initialized convolutional neural network in a training-data-free regime. However, DIP suffers from overfitting to noisy measurements due to network over-parameterization, making early stopping (ES) essential. The most successful ES method tracks fluctuations in the running variance of the network output to detect overfitting. However, in many applications, these fluctuations may appear prematurely, leading to unstable reconstructions. In this paper, we first show that nearly optimal DIP early stopping can be achieved when two independent noisy copies of the degraded image are available. Motivated by this observation, and since obtaining two fully independent copies is infeasible, we propose an overfitting detection framework based on constructing pseudo self-referenced images, resulting in three IIP-specific algorithms. Our approach is further supported by theoretical results on single-reference validation, pseudo-validation estimation, and the impact of shared noise. Across different IIPs, ranging from natural image restoration to medical image reconstruction, and under varying noise levels and noise types, our methods consistently outperform existing DIP early stopping approaches, all without requiring an accurate estimate of the noise level.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: early stopping for Deep Image Prior in image restoration

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a self-referenced early stopping approach for Deep Image Prior that uses two noisy copies to achieve near-optimal stopping for image restoration.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 深度图像先验（DIP）在逆成像中易过拟合，现有早停方法因波动提前导致不稳定。本文提出基于自参考的早停方法，利用两个独立噪声副本实现近乎最优的早停，有效提升DIP在图像修复任务中的重建稳定性。

quick_skim.title: HarmoVid: Relightful Video Portrait Harmonization
quick_skim.abstract: We present a method for harmonizing the lighting of a foreground video to match a target background scene, adjusting shadows, color tone, and illumination intensity (relightful harmonization). Unlike images, acquiring labeled data for videos, where identical motions are recorded under different lighting conditions, is practically infeasible and non-scalable. While one way to create such paired data is to apply existing image-based harmonization models frame by frame to a video, the resulting outputs often suffer from significant temporal jitters. We overcome this problem by introducing a novel lighting deflickering model that can stabilize the global and local lighting flickering artifacts. Our video diffusion model learns from these upgraded deflickered data with a volume of real and synthetic videos to generate high-quality video harmonization results. We further propose an asymmetric alpha mask conditioning technique to learn the clean boundaries from real videos. Experiments demonstrate that our model achieves strong temporal coherence, naturalness, cleaner boundaries, and physically meaningful lighting behavior, while maintaining strong relighting expressiveness compared to prior image-based and video-based harmonization methods.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: video diffusion model for harmonization (image editing)
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 视频扩散模型用于光照协调（图像编辑）
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 视频扩散模型用于光照协调（图像编辑）
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 视频扩散模型用于光照协调（图像编辑）
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Uses a video diffusion model with lighting deflickering to harmonize foreground video lighting to a target background, adjusting shadows, color, and illumination.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视频肖像光照协调任务中帧间闪烁的问题，提出一种基于视频扩散模型的光照去闪烁方法。该方法通过体积数据学习稳定全局和局部光照变化，生成与背景场景协调的前景视频，实现了光照、阴影和色调的自动调整，显著优于逐帧应用图像协调模型的结果。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对视频肖像光照协调任务中帧间闪烁的问题，提出一种基于视频扩散模型的光照去闪烁方法。该方法通过体积数据学习稳定全局和局部光照变化，生成与背景场景协调的前景视频，实现了光照、阴影和色调的自动调整，显著优于逐帧应用图像协调模型的结果。

quick_skim.title: DP-SAPF: Saliency-Aware Parameter Fine-tuning of Public Models for Differentially Private Image Synthesis
quick_skim.abstract: Differentially private (DP) image synthesis generates images that preserve the statistical characteristics of a sensitive dataset, enabling sensitive data analysis and usage while providing rigorous guarantees of privacy leakage. Existing methods fine-tune public models using DP Stochastic Gradient Descent (DP-SGD) on sensitive images to generate synthetic images. But full fine-tuning public models on sensitive images is computationally expensive, because current public models typically contain a large number of parameters. Recent work proposes heuristically using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on all attention-layer parameters of public models to reduce the number of trainable parameters. However, we argue that exhaustive LoRA coverage across all attention-layer parameters is suboptimal in a DP setting, as it leads to noise accumulation and collapse during private training.   To address this issue, we propose DP-SAPF, which uses a saliency-aware strategy to identify specific target parameters for LoRA training under DP. DP-SAPF is inspired by the fact that larger gradients signify higher saliency, indicating that these parameters are most critical for the DP learning. Specifically, we feed the sensitive images into public models, compute gradients, and add noise to the gradients to satisfy DP. Then, DP-SAPF identifies the most salient parameters, those exhibiting high gradient magnitudes on sensitive images, for DP fine-tuning. Experiments on four sensitive image datasets show that DP-SAPF improves the utility and fidelity of synthetic images while requiring fewer computational resources than fine-tuning methods without parameter selection.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: saliency-aware fine-tuning of public models for differentially private image synthesis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 显著性感知微调公共模型用于差分隐私图像合成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 显著性感知微调公共模型用于差分隐私图像合成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 显著性感知微调公共模型用于差分隐私图像合成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DP-SAPF uses saliency-aware LoRA fine-tuning to reduce computational cost in differentially private image synthesis while preserving privacy guarantees.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 差分隐私图像合成微调大型公共模型计算成本高。该论文提出DP-SAPF，通过显著性感知的低秩适应（LoRA）选择性微调模型参数，仅优化对生成质量最重要的部分，在减少可训练参数的同时保持隐私保护效果。方法在多个数据集上验证了效率与质量的平衡。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 差分隐私图像合成微调大型公共模型计算成本高。该论文提出DP-SAPF，通过显著性感知的低秩适应（LoRA）选择性微调模型参数，仅优化对生成质量最重要的部分，在减少可训练参数的同时保持隐私保护效果。方法在多个数据集上验证了效率与质量的平衡。
